hypotheses.statement: ATR filters reduce drawdown during high-volatility expansion.
Momentum performs better after volatility compression.
Trend continuation improves when entries require ATR-confirmed momentum.
Bull trend pullbacks with momentum recovery outperform blind breakout entries.
Bear trend continuation improves when exits trail volatility.
Shorting failed rallies outperforms oversold reversal in bear regimes.
RSI reversal performs better inside ranging markets than trend following.
Bollinger extremes revert more reliably when volatility is contained.
